positive: A clean silhouette of a majestic, stylized celestial fox (kitsune) perched atop a crescent moon. The fox should have ethereal, flowing fur rendered in vibrant azure and gold accents. It is surrounded by swirling nebulae and abstract geometric constellations forming a portal effect. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical. The style should be a blend of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic and modern stained-glass luminescence. Use deep indigo and midnight blue as background primary colors, contrasted sharply by brilliant gold leaf details and glowing cyan accents. Perfect for screen printing, high contrast, bold lines, vaporwave influences. Clean lines, no gradient over solid color areas.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, fuzzy, cropped, low detail, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, messy, noisy, low contrast
